title: Master of Social Work Program Application and Fees
content:
Master of Social Work Program Application and Fees

2025-2026 Spring Semester online application deadline: December 15, 2025

Application Deadline: Sunday, January 25, 2026

Results Announcement Date: Wednesday, January 28, 2026

Main List Registration Deadlines: January 28 - February 4, 2026

Reserve List Registration Deadlines: February 5 - 13, 2026

Click here

for Online Pre-Registration Link.

ALES Score Type:

EQUAL WEIGHT (EA)

Dear candidate students;

In the Spring Semester of the 2023-2024 Academic Year,  there will be no science exam in our Thesis/Non-Thesis Master's Programs;

1) In the program with thesis, 65% of ALES in Equal Weight score type, 35% of undergraduate graduation grade point average,

2) In the non-thesis program, 50% of the undergraduate graduation grade and 50% of the relevant score type ALES, if any*, will be evaluated.

*(If the candidates applying to non-thesis programs do not have ALES scores, they will be evaluated as 55 points.)

The applications of the candidates who do not apply online, who are not graduated during the application, who do not upload their ALES document and their identity information to the application system will be deemed invalid.

- Original or certified copy of the undergraduate diploma

-Original or certified copy of the undergraduate transcript (transcript)

-Photocopy of Identity Card

-Photo (2 Pieces)

SPECIAL CONDITIONS FOR CANDIDATES

Applicants will be selected in order of success.

* Scientific Preparation is applied with one course to be given in two semesters for undergraduate graduates other than Social Work.

SOH141 Introduction to Social Work

SOH304 Social Work Legislation

TUITION FEES:
